LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED FROM FEB-13-2015 TO MAR-13-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 13, 2015 AT 4:00 P.M. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BRIAN H. SONG, ESQ. of Song & Lee, Tel No. 408-748-3308 appearing for Plaintiff Caleb Yi;
Atty. MICHAEL D. BLUTO of the Law Office of Michael D. Bluto, Tel No. 415-886-0001 appearing for Defendant Ji Hyung Won.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF CALEB YI'S Hearing For Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award, the motion to confirm arbitration is granted. Defendant fails to show a basis to vacate the award. The court awards $12,958 in attorney's fees and $165.40 in costs. ORDER AND JUDGMENT EACH SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CALEB YI dba Pinix Realty's Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration is granted. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately regarding the appointment of an arbitrator. If those efforts are unsuccessful, then the parties shall comply with the arbitrator selection process set forth in CCP 1281.6. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Continued To Mar-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CALEB YI'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration is continued to March 13, 2015 to give moving and opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 13, 2015 at 4:00 p.m. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
